svg.text: Lambda Architecture Pattern · ESPRIT End of Year Project
Java 8 · Apache NiFi · Apache Kafka · Apache Spark (Streaming + MLlib) · Hadoop (HDFS + MapReduce) · Apache Drools · Elasticsearch · Kibana · Ubuntu Linux
Lambda Architecture — Speed layer (real-time, low latency) + Batch layer (high throughput, historical) merge into unified serving layer
Apache Drools Business Rules Engine validates and routes data before indexing · Invalid records routed to Dead Letter Queue
